sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44699" key="eu)pare/kdutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπαρ-έκδυτος</orth>, <sense id="n44699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slipping out of place easily.</tr_> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n44699.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily inserted</tr_>, Paul.Aeg <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg010.perseus-grc1:6:114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.114</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
